_meta.name: character_sheet_vnccs
_meta.stage: VNCCS 3.0.1 Step 1 — base character sheet (identity) only; clothing/emotions/poses are later stages

models.sheet_stage: qwen_image_edit_2511_fp8mixed.safetensors + qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled TE + qwen_image_vae + 2511 Lightning 4-step LoRA (via Control Center custom mode) + VNCCS PoseStudio ART V5.9.5 LoRA (applied by generator)
models.upscaler: 4x_APISR_GRL_GAN (GAN mode; SeedVR2 node pack not installed)
models.bg_remove: VNCCS chroma key preset balanced, SAM3 details recovery OFF (SAM3 not provisioned; silent-download path), internal RMBG OFF

_meta.pose_refs: 6 canonical A-pose views (front/34L/profileL/back/34R/profileR) rendered offline from VNCCS_Utils MakeHuman CharacterData (mesh params in pose_data.mesh; head verts scaled 1.15 about neck pivot for chibi-leaning proportion) and embedded as pose_data.captured_images. The node's server-side fallback renderer is broken (deg/rad double-conversion => A-pose only; np.matrix crash on modelRotation!=0), so captured_images is the API-driveable path; live 3D posing is frontend-only.
_meta.vram: QIE2511 fp8 ~20.5GB weights on one 3090: ComfyUI partially offloads; do not co-load judge/aux models
_meta.outputs: generator also saves versioned sprites to ComfyUI/output/VNCCS/Characters/Warden/
_meta.run_record: 2026-07-12: this exact file produced the accepted Warden base set (458s on one 3090; sprites at output/VNCCS/Characters/Warden/Sprites/Naked/Neutral/, superseded runs auto-versioned to V*/). Prompt-scaffold findings: bare 'chibi' or '(chibi:1.25)' on the hardcoded 640x1536 preview canvas collapses Illustrious-XL-v2.0 into multi-figure sticker collages; palette words in body tags ('ember orange and soot black color scheme') dye the SKIN; 'glowing orange eyes' renders glowing orbs; Blue screen contaminates skin where Green does not.
_meta.known_issues: front-view frame can render as a back view (flat-shaded mannequin facing cue is weak); chroma key leaves ground-shadow blobs under feet; hair length can drift on back views; proportions are lanky-teen, not 1:2 chibi — true chibi enforcement needs a dedicated stage or a license-checked chibi LoRA, not base-sheet prompt tags

inputs.widget_data: {"character": "Warden", "preview_valid": false, "preview_source": "gen", "character_info": {"name": "Warden", "sex": "male", "age": 32, "race": "human", "skin_color": "fair skin", "hair": "black short hair", "eyes": "orange eyes", "face": "stern face, sharp eyes, thick eyebrows", "body": "athletic, broad shoulders", "additional_details": "1boy, solo, full body, standing, looking at viewer", "nsfw": false, "aesthetics": "masterpiece", "negative_prompt": "bad quality,worst quality,worst detail,sketch,censor, missing arm, missing leg, distorted body, multiple views, multiple boys, 2boys, multiple girls, reference sheet, character sheet, text, letters, watermark, signature, logo, speech bubble, comic panel, border, cropped", "lora_prompt": "", "background_color": "Green", "seed": 20260712}, "gen_settings": {"generation_mode": "illustrious", "ckpt_name": "Illustrious-XL-v2.0.safetensors", "sampler": "euler", "scheduler": "normal", "steps": 24, "cfg": 6.0, "seed": 20260712, "seed_mode": "fixed", "dmd_lora_name": "", "dmd_lora_strength": 0, "age_lora_name": "", "lora_stack": []}}

inputs.prompt: Draw character from image2 in the exact pose and camera angle of the mannequin in image1. The character must face the same direction as the mannequin. Full body, whole figure visible, soft even lighting, warm highlights
